fields.title: Plan Title
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this skill plan is for
fields.shipHint: Optional. The selected ship icon will be shown in the plan list.
fields.skillsTextPlaceholder:
One skill per line, for example:
Graviton Physics 5
Doomsday Rapid Firing 5
Capital Shield Operation 4
fields.skillsTextGuide: Open the in-game skill planner to view the details. Use the top-right button to copy all skills to the clipboard, then paste them into the field above.
fields.skillsTextHint: Supported format: skill name + space + level. Levels may use 1-5 or Roman numerals I-V. Duplicate skills automatically keep the highest level.

apply.finalAmountHint: Enter 0 to use the recommended amount

newbroSettings.title: Newbro Settings
newbroSettings.subtitle: Manage newbro eligibility rules, eligibility refresh cadence, and captain reward percentages.
newbroSettings.eligibilityHint: Eligibility is evaluated against skill point snapshots across all characters bound to the user.
newbroSettings.maxCharacterSPPlaceholder: A user stops being a newbro once any character reaches this SP
newbroSettings.multiCharacterSPPlaceholder: Count characters that reach at least this SP
newbroSettings.multiCharacterThresholdPlaceholder: A user stops being a newbro once this many characters meet the threshold
newbroSettings.refreshHint: Users already classified as non-newbro are only recalculated after rule changes. Users still classified as newbro are recalculated on the cadence below.
newbroSettings.refreshIntervalDaysPlaceholder: Current newbros are recalculated after this many days
newbroSettings.rewardHint: Reward processing sums unprocessed attributed bounty and converts it into wallet credits using this percentage.
